intent: Inform a client their project delivery will be delayed
generated_email:
Subject: Important update regarding your project timeline

Dear [Client Name],

I sincerely apologize for the delay in the delivery of your project. While our original deadline was set for June 20th, we now anticipate completing the work by July 20th.

We take full responsibility for this shift in schedule, which has been caused by unforeseen technical challenges involving our third-party API integration. We are working closely with the providers to resolve these issues and ensure the final delivery meets our quality standards.

To compensate for this inconvenience, I would like to offer a 10% discount on the final project invoice. We value your partnership and appreciate your patience as we finalize these technical requirements.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Hi there,

Hope you’re having a good week. 

I’m reaching out because I’ve been working on an AI-powered HR automation tool that’s specifically built to help companies in your size range—50 to 200 employees—streamline their hiring workflow. It’s currently cutting onboarding time by about 40%, which tends to save teams a massive amount of manual work.

If you’re looking to get your new hires up to speed faster, I’d love for you to take it for a spin. We’ve got a free 14-day trial set up so you can see how it handles your specific process. 

Let me know if you’re open to a quick look.

Best,

[Your Name]
